case_title: YAN FENG MAI VS. AMAZON.COM INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAI, YAN FENG AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF YAN FENG MAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAI, YAN FENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER LILLY ALEMAYEHU REQUEST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MAI, YAN FENG AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INC.
